title: Shark Tank's Aman Gupta gets relief from Delhi HC against obscene content, unauthorised merchandise sale
description: The Delhi High Court has ordered social media intermediaries and search engines including Telegram, Meta Platforms and Google to take down online content found to be violating the registered trademarks and personality rights of Aman Gupta, judge on Shark Tank India and co-founder of boAt Lifestyle.Justice Tushar Rao Gedela on May 7 passed an ex-parte interim injunction order to protect Gupta's personality rights after hearing a suit against unauthorised commercial exploitation of his personality
